3118840.name: Sibir
3118840.description:
[h1]Overview[/h1]

Sibir is a work in progress survival exploration horror game set in the unforgiving depths of an abandoned Soviet bunker. You must navigate through the harsh environment, battling extreme temperatures and dwindling resources. Your primary goal is to complete the government issued tasks.

Every step you take could be your last...

[h1]Key Features[/h1]

  • Manage your health, warmth, and stamina as you scavenge for supplies to keep yourself alive.

  • Utilize materials found in the environment to craft materials to protect yourself from the elements and wildlife.

  • Traverse endless chambers, uncovering secrets and clues.

  • Monitor your temperature, be wary of smoke and hypothermia as you struggle to stay alive.

  • Team up with friends or other players in cooperative multiplayer mode to increase your chances of survival.

Prepare yourself for the ultimate test of survival in Sibir.

Can you withstand the elements and make it out alive, or will the bunker consume you?

The adventure starts now...
3118840.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
